title: Sanofi India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Sanofi India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Sanofi India has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Pune office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Sanofi India:
Sanofi India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sanofi India!
